titleStmt.title: SII 7.360: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 360. (A.R. No. 162 of 1901). ON THE EIGHTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) nama[ḥ .*] śrīsarasvatyayē(ṁ) nama[ḥ .*] śrī gurubhyō(ṁ)
[ni¨rvvi]ghnama[stu .] namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanaga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kavaruṣa 1398 saṁdu toṁbhattaroṁbhattaneya va¨rttamāna du(ṁ)¨rmmukhisaṁvatsarada
vayiśākha śu 3 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa [praU]
ḍha virūpākṣarāyamahārāyarū vijeyānagariyalū siṁhvāsanastharāgi sa
kala va(ṁ)¨rna dha¨r(ṁ)mmāśra maṁgaḷaṁ pratipālisuttiha kāladalū Ā rāyara daṁṇā
yakavoḍayara nirūpadiṁ viṭharasavoḍeyarū bārakūrarājyava nāḷuva kāladalū
śrīmatu maṇigāṟakēriya śrīsōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyalu pra
paṁcada sōvakkanu māḍida dha¨r(ṁ)mma . yī maṭhadalu vuṁba brā(ṁ)hmara
jana pratidivasadalu ja 6 kkaṁ biṭṭa bāḷu haṁdeṭinavoḷage bhaṭṭana
bāḷa catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu meneyana beṭṭina gaḍiyiṁda
paḍuvalu teṁkalu mādaṁṇahaṁde kesāsuriya gaḍiyiṁda
baḍagalu paḍuvalu sabbāyitana Āgarada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu baḍagalu Akṣarahaṁdeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mattavā
gaddeya catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu Uppināgarada sāliṁdaṁ
paḍuvalu teṁkalu [Aṁṇa]hēraḷara gaḍiṁ vūrāḷana gaḍi
yiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beṁgaraya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu teṁka
lu bāḷina surikūrāḷana gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu Upina Āgara saha
mattagaddeya catussīmeya vivara [Ajñaṇa] ḷara gaḍiyiṁ paḍuva
lu rāḷana gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu samudrada gaḍiyiṁ
mūḍalu hiriya māṇi haṁdeya gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu mattaṁ U
ppinaĀgara catussīmeya vivara ya
gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu hiriya māṇihaṁdeya gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu hara
variya mādaṁṇahaṁdheya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu mādaṁṇahaṁde
ya gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa Uppināgara ka
ḷa du tāluguṁdhi yeraḍu guḍe yi catussīmeyavoḷage bittuva
mu 11 . yi bāḷiguḷḷa maneyaḍiya catussīmeya vivara beṁgare
yahaṁdeyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu naḍava vōṇiyiṁ baḍagalu
paḍuvalu mādaṇahaṁdeya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu [Akṣa]ra
(ra)haṁdeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīme
yavoḷaguḷḷa bāḷu Uppināgara mane yiṁtī
bittuvadu ba 4 lū mu 11 yi bā
Akki mu 30
Digital edition of SII 7.360 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
